```text
   127→
   128→      switch (type) {

   144→        case 'disconnect': {

   146→          setSocketIsConnect(false)

   149→        case 'sid': {

   153→        }

   156→          if (typeof typedPayload !== 'string') {
   157→            return this.handleEvent(
   158→              typedPayload.type,
   159→              camelcaseKeys(typedPayload.data),

   161→          }

   166→          this.handleEvent(type, camelcaseKeys(data))

   168→      }
   169→    }
```

```text
     5→  OnGatewayDisconnect,
     6→} from '@nestjs/websockets'
     7→import {
     8→  ConnectedSocket,
     9→  MessageBody,
    10→  SubscribeMessage,
    11→  WebSocketGateway,
    12→  WebSocketServer,
    13→} from '@nestjs/websockets'
    14→import type { BroadcastOperator, Emitter } from '@socket.io/redis-emitter'
    15→import { debounce, uniqBy } from 'es-toolkit/compat'
    16→import type SocketIO from 'socket.io'
    17→import { DefaultEventsMap } from 'socket.io'
    18→
    19→import { BusinessEvents } from '~/constants/business-event.constant'
    20→import { RedisKeys } from '~/constants/cache.constant'
    21→import { RedisService } from '~/processors/redis/redis.service'
    22→import { getRedisKey } from '~/utils/redis.util'
    23→import { scheduleManager } from '~/utils/schedule.util'
    24→import { getShortDate } from '~/utils/time.util'
    25→
    26→import { BroadcastBaseGateway } from '../base.gateway'
    27→import type { SocketType } from '../gateway.service'
    28→import { GatewayService } from '../gateway.service'
    29→import { MessageEventDto, SupportedMessageEvent } from './dtos/message.schema'
    30→import type { EventGatewayHooks } from './hook.interface'
    31→
    32→declare module '~/types/socket-meta' {
    33→  interface SocketMetadata {
    34→    sessionId: string
    35→    lang?: string
    36→
    37→    roomJoinedAtMap: Record<string, number>
    38→  }
    39→}
    40→
    41→const namespace = 'web'
    42→
    43→// @UseGuards(WsExtendThrottlerGuard)
    44→@WebSocketGateway<GatewayMetadata>({
    45→  namespace,
    46→})
    47→export class WebEventsGateway
    48→  extends BroadcastBaseGateway
    49→  implements OnGatewayConnection, OnGatewayDisconnect
    50→{
    51→  private readonly logger = new Logger(WebEventsGateway.name)
    52→  private readonly socketFetchSoftTimeoutMs = 800
    53→  private lastSocketFetchWarnAt = 0
    54→
    55→  constructor(
    56→    private readonly redisService: RedisService,
    57→
    58→    private readonly gatewayService: GatewayService,
    59→  ) {
    60→    super()
    61→  }
    62→
    63→  private hooks: EventGatewayHooks = {
    64→    onConnected: [],
    65→    onDisconnected: [],
    66→    onMessage: [],
    67→
    68→    onJoinRoom: [],
    69→    onLeaveRoom: [],
    70→  }
    71→
    72→  public registerHook<T extends keyof EventGatewayHooks>(
    73→    type: T,
    74→    callback: EventGatewayHooks[T][number],
    75→  ) {
    76→    // @ts-expect-error
    77→    this.hooks[type].push(callback)
    78→    return () => {
    79→      // @ts-expect-error
    80→      this.hooks[type] = this.hooks[type].filter((fn) => fn !== callback)
    81→    }
    82→  }
    83→
    84→  @WebSocketServer()
    85→  private namespace: SocketIO.Namespace
    86→
    87→  async sendOnlineNumber() {
    88→    return {
    89→      online: await this.getCurrentClientCount(),
    90→      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    91→    }
    92→  }
    93→
    94→  async getCurrentClientCount() {
    95→    const server = this.namespace.server
    96→
    97→    try {
    98→      const socketsMeta = await Promise.all(
    99→        await this.fetchSocketsWithSoftTimeout(
   100→          () => server.of(`/${namespace}`).fetchSockets(),
   101→          'getCurrentClientCount',
   102→        ).then((sockets) => {
   103→          return sockets.map((socket) =>
   104→            this.gatewayService.getSocketMetadata(socket),
   105→          )
   106→        }),
   107→      )
   108→      return uniqBy(socketsMeta, (x) => x?.sessionId).length
   109→    } catch (error) {
   110→      this.warnSocketFetchFailure(
   111→        'fetchSockets failed in getCurrentClientCount, fallback to local sockets count',
   112→        error,
   113→      )
   114→      return this.namespace.sockets.size
   115→    }
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  @SubscribeMessage('message')
   119→  async handleMessageEvent(
   120→    @MessageBody() data: MessageEventDto,
   121→    @ConnectedSocket() socket: SocketIO.Socket,
   122→  ) {
   123→    const { payload, type } = data
   124→
   125→    // logger.debug('Received message', { type, payload })
   126→
   127→    switch (type) {
   128→      case SupportedMessageEvent.Join: {
   129→        const { roomName } = payload as { roomName: string }
   130→        if (roomName) {
   131→          socket.join(roomName)
   132→          this.logger.log(`Socket ${socket.id} joined room [${roomName}]`)
   133→          this.hooks.onJoinRoom.forEach((fn) => fn(socket, roomName))
   134→
   135→          const roomJoinedAtMap = await this.getSocketRoomJoinedAtMap(socket)
   136→
   137→          roomJoinedAtMap[roomName] = Date.now()
   138→
   139→          await this.gatewayService.setSocketMetadata(socket, {
   140→            roomJoinedAtMap,
   141→          })
   142→        }
   143→        break
   144→      }
   145→      case SupportedMessageEvent.Leave: {
   146→        const { roomName } = payload as { roomName: string }
   147→        if (roomName) {
   148→          socket.leave(roomName)
   149→          this.hooks.onLeaveRoom.forEach((fn) => fn(socket, roomName))
   150→
   151→          const roomJoinedAtMap = await this.getSocketRoomJoinedAtMap(socket)
   152→          delete roomJoinedAtMap[roomName]
   153→          await this.gatewayService.setSocketMetadata(socket, {
   154→            roomJoinedAtMap,
   155→          })
   156→        }
   157→        break
   158→      }
   159→      case SupportedMessageEvent.UpdateSid: {
   160→        const { sessionId } = payload as { sessionId: string }
   161→        if (sessionId) {
   162→          await this.gatewayService.setSocketMetadata(socket, { sessionId })
   163→          this.whenUserOnline()
   164→        }
   165→        break
   166→      }
   167→      case SupportedMessageEvent.UpdateLang: {
   168→        const { lang } = payload as { lang: string }
   169→        if (
   170→          lang &&
   171→          typeof lang === 'string' &&
   172→          /^[a-z]{2}(?:-[A-Za-z]{2,})?$/.test(lang)
   173→        ) {
   174→          await this.updateSocketLang(socket, lang)
   175→        }
   176→        break
   177→      }
   178→    }
   179→
   180→    this.hooks.onMessage.forEach((fn) => fn(socket, data))
   181→  }
   182→
   183→  async handleConnection(socket: SocketIO.Socket) {
   184→    const webSessionId =
   185→      socket.handshake.headers['x-socket-session-id'] ||
   186→      socket.handshake.query.socket_session_id ||
   187→      // fallback sid
   188→      socket.id
   189→
   190→    const rawLang = socket.handshake.query.lang as string | undefined
   191→    const lang =
   192→      rawLang && /^[a-z]{2}(?:-[A-Za-z]{2,})?$/.test(rawLang)
   193→        ? rawLang
   194→        : undefined
   195→
   196→    await this.gatewayService.setSocketMetadata(socket, {
   197→      sessionId: webSessionId,
   198→      ...(lang ? { lang } : {}),
   199→    })
   200→
   201→    if (lang) {
   202→      socket.join(`lang:${lang}`)
   203→    }
   204→
   205→    this.whenUserOnline()
   206→    super.handleConnect(socket)
   207→    this.hooks.onConnected.forEach((fn) => fn(socket))
   208→  }
   209→
   210→  private async updateSocketLang(socket: SocketIO.Socket, lang: string) {
   211→    const meta = await this.gatewayService.getSocketMetadata(socket)
   212→    const prevLang = meta?.lang
   213→    if (prevLang) {
   214→      socket.leave(`lang:${prevLang}`)
   215→    }
   216→    socket.join(`lang:${lang}`)
   217→    await this.gatewayService.setSocketMetadata(socket, { lang })
   218→  }
   219→
   220→  whenUserOnline = debounce(
   221→    async () => {
   222→      this.broadcast(
   223→        BusinessEvents.VISITOR_ONLINE,
   224→        await this.sendOnlineNumber(),
   225→      )
   226→
   227→      scheduleManager.schedule(async () => {
   228→        const redisClient = this.redisService.getClient()
   229→        const dateFormat = getShortDate(new Date())
   230→
   231→        // get and store max_online_count
   232→        const maxOnlineCount =
   233→          +(await redisClient.hget(
   234→            getRedisKey(RedisKeys.MaxOnlineCount),
   235→            dateFormat,
   236→          ))! || 0
   237→        await redisClient.hset(
   238→          getRedisKey(RedisKeys.MaxOnlineCount),
   239→          dateFormat,
   240→          Math.max(maxOnlineCount, await this.getCurrentClientCount()),
   241→        )
   242→        const key = getRedisKey(RedisKeys.MaxOnlineCount, 'total')
   243→
   244→        const totalCount = +(await redisClient.hget(key, dateFormat))! || 0
   245→        await redisClient.hset(key, dateFormat, totalCount + 1)
   246→      })
   247→    },
   248→    1000,
   249→    {
   250→      leading: false,
   251→    },
   252→  )
   253→
   254→  async handleDisconnect(socket: SocketIO.Socket) {
   255→    super.handleDisconnect(socket)
   256→    this.broadcast(BusinessEvents.VISITOR_OFFLINE, {
   257→      ...(await this.sendOnlineNumber()),
   258→      sessionId: (await this.gatewayService.getSocketMetadata(socket))
   259→        ?.sessionId,
   260→    })
   261→    this.hooks.onDisconnected.forEach((fn) => fn(socket))
   262→    this.gatewayService.clearSocketMetadata(socket)
   263→
   264→    socket.rooms.forEach((roomName) => {
   265→      this.hooks.onLeaveRoom.forEach((fn) => fn(socket, roomName))
   266→    })
   267→  }
   268→
   269→  override broadcast(
   270→    event: BusinessEvents,
   271→    data: any,
   272→
   273→    options?: {
   274→      rooms?: string[]
   275→      exclude?: string[]
   276→    },
   277→  ) {
   278→    const emitter = this.redisService.emitter
   279→
   280→    let socket = emitter.of(`/${namespace}`) as
   281→      | Emitter<DefaultEventsMap>
   282→      | BroadcastOperator<DefaultEventsMap>
   283→    const rooms = options?.rooms
   284→    const exclude = options?.exclude
   285→
   286→    if (rooms && rooms.length > 0) {
   287→      this.logger.log(`broadcast [${event}] to rooms [${rooms.join(',')}]`)
   288→      socket = socket.in(rooms)
   289→    } else {
   290→      this.logger.log(`broadcast [${event}] to all`)
   291→    }
   292→    if (exclude && exclude.length > 0) {
   293→      socket = socket.except(exclude)
   294→    }
   295→    socket.emit('message', this.gatewayMessageFormat(event, data))
   296→  }
   297→
   298→  public async getSocketsOfRoom(
   299→    roomName: string,
   300→  ): Promise<SocketIO.Socket[] | SocketIO.RemoteSocket<any, any>[]> {
   301→    try {
   302→      return await this.fetchSocketsWithSoftTimeout(
   303→        () => this.namespace.in(roomName).fetchSockets(),
   304→        `getSocketsOfRoom(${roomName})`,
   305→      )
   306→    } catch (error) {
   307→      this.warnSocketFetchFailure(
   308→        `fetchSockets failed for room [${roomName}], fallback to local room sockets`,
   309→        error,
   310→      )
   311→      try {
   312→        return await this.namespace.in(roomName).local.fetchSockets()
   313→      } catch (fallbackError) {
   314→        this.warnSocketFetchFailure(
   315→          `local fetchSockets failed for room [${roomName}], returning empty`,
   316→          fallbackError,
   317→        )
   318→        return []
   319→      }
   320→    }
   321→  }
   322→
   323→  // private isValidBizRoomName(roomName: string) {
   324→  //   return roomName.split('-').length === 2
   325→  // }
   326→  public async getAllRooms() {
   327→    let sockets: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof this.namespace.fetchSockets>>
   328→    try {
   329→      sockets = await this.fetchSocketsWithSoftTimeout(
   330→        () => this.namespace.fetchSockets(),
   331→        'getAllRooms',
   332→      )
   333→    } catch (error) {
   334→      this.warnSocketFetchFailure(
   335→        'fetchSockets failed in getAllRooms, fallback to local sockets',
   336→        error,
   337→      )
   338→      try {
   339→        sockets = await this.namespace.local.fetchSockets()
   340→      } catch (fallbackError) {
   341→        this.warnSocketFetchFailure(
   342→          'local fetchSockets failed in getAllRooms, returning empty',
   343→          fallbackError,
   344→        )
   345→        return {}
   346→      }
   347→    }
   348→    const roomToSocketsMap = {} as Record<string, (typeof sockets)[number][]>
   349→    for (const socket of sockets) {
   350→      socket.rooms.forEach((roomName) => {
   351→        if (roomName === socket.id) return
   352→
   353→        if (!roomToSocketsMap[roomName]) {
   354→          roomToSocketsMap[roomName] = []
   355→        }
   356→        roomToSocketsMap[roomName].push(socket)
   357→      })
   358→    }
   359→    return roomToSocketsMap
   360→  }
   361→
   362→  public async getSocketRoomJoinedAtMap(socket: SocketType) {
   363→    const roomJoinedAtMap =
   364→      (await this.gatewayService.getSocketMetadata(socket))?.roomJoinedAtMap ||
   365→      {}
   366→
   367→    return roomJoinedAtMap
   368→  }
   369→
   370→  private async fetchSocketsWithSoftTimeout<T>(
   371→    fetcher: () => Promise<T>,
   372→    context: string,
   373→  ): Promise<T> {
   374→    let timer: NodeJS.Timeout | undefined
   375→
   376→    try {
   377→      return await Promise.race([
   378→        fetcher(),
   379→        new Promise<T>((_, reject) => {
   380→          timer = setTimeout(() => {
   381→            reject(
   382→              new Error(
   383→                `fetchSockets soft timeout (${this.socketFetchSoftTimeoutMs}ms) in ${context}`,
   384→              ),
   385→            )
   386→          }, this.socketFetchSoftTimeoutMs)
   387→        }),
   388→      ])
   389→    } finally {
   390→      if (timer) {
   391→        clearTimeout(timer)
   392→      }
   393→    }
   394→  }
   395→
   396→  private warnSocketFetchFailure(message: string, error: unknown) {
   397→    const now = Date.now()
   398→    if (now - this.lastSocketFetchWarnAt < 10_000) {
   399→      return
   400→    }
   401→    this.lastSocketFetchWarnAt = now
   402→
   403→    const reason = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
   404→    this.logger.warn(`${message}. reason=${reason}`)
   405→  }
   406→}
   407→
```

```text
     1→import type { Socket } from 'socket.io'
     2→
     3→import { BusinessEvents } from '~/constants/business-event.constant'
     4→
     5→export abstract class BaseGateway {
     6→  public gatewayMessageFormat(
     7→    type: BusinessEvents,
     8→    message: any,
     9→    code?: number,
    10→  ) {
    11→    return {
    12→      type,
    13→      data: structuredClone(message),
    14→      code,
    15→    }
    16→  }
    17→
    18→  handleDisconnect(client: Socket) {
    19→    client.send(
    20→      this.gatewayMessageFormat(
    21→        BusinessEvents.GATEWAY_CONNECT,
    22→        'WebSocket 断开',
    23→      ),
    24→    )
    25→  }
    26→  handleConnect(client: Socket) {
    27→    client.send(
    28→      this.gatewayMessageFormat(
    29→        BusinessEvents.GATEWAY_CONNECT,
    30→        'WebSocket 已连接',
    31→      ),
    32→    )
    33→  }
    34→
    35→  abstract broadcast(
    36→    event: BusinessEvents,
    37→    data: any,
    38→    options?: { rooms?: string[]; exclude?: string[] },
    39→  ): void
    40→}
    41→
    42→export abstract class BroadcastBaseGateway extends BaseGateway {}
    43→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `<GIT_DIR>/mx-core/apps/telemetry/src/index.ts`

```text
     1→interface Env {
     2→  DB: D1Database
     3→}
     4→
     5→interface TelemetryPayload {
     6→  instanceId: string
     7→  version: string
     8→  nodeVersion?: string
     9→  event: string
    10→}
    11→
    12→const ALLOWED_EVENTS = new Set(['startup', 'heartbeat'])
    13→const UUID_RE = /^[\da-f]{8}(?:-[\da-f]{4}){3}-[\da-f]{12}$/i
    14→const MAX_FIELD_LENGTH = 64
    15→
    16→const corsHeaders = {
    17→  'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
    18→  'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, OPTIONS',
    19→  'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type, Authorization',
    20→}
    21→
    22→function jsonResponse(data: unknown, status = 200): Response {
    23→  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data), {
    24→    status,
    25→    headers: {
    26→      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    27→      ...corsHeaders,
    28→    },
    29→  })
    30→}
    31→
    32→function safeJsonStringify(value: unknown): string {
    33→  return JSON.stringify(value).replaceAll('</', '<\\/')
    34→}
    35→
    36→async function handleCollect(request: Request, env: Env): Promise<Response> {
    37→  try {
    38→    const payload = (await request.json()) as TelemetryPayload
    39→
    40→    if (!payload.instanceId || !payload.version || !payload.event) {
    41→      return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing required fields' }, 400)
    42→    }
    43→
    44→    if (!UUID_RE.test(payload.instanceId)) {
    45→      return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid instanceId format' }, 400)
    46→    }
    47→
    48→    if (!ALLOWED_EVENTS.has(payload.event)) {
    49→      return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid event type' }, 400)
    50→    }
    51→
    52→    if (
    53→      payload.version.length > MAX_FIELD_LENGTH ||
    54→      (payload.nodeVersion && payload.nodeVersion.length > MAX_FIELD_LENGTH)
    55→    ) {
    56→      return jsonResponse({ error: 'Field too long' }, 400)
    57→    }
    58→
    59→    await env.DB.prepare(
    60→      'INSERT INTO telemetry (instance_id, version, node_version, event) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)',
    61→    )
    62→      .bind(
    63→        payload.instanceId,
    64→        payload.version,
    65→        payload.nodeVersion || null,
    66→        payload.event,
    67→      )
    68→      .run()
    69→
    70→    return jsonResponse({ success: true })
    71→  } catch (error) {
    72→    console.error('Collect error:', error)
    73→    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Internal server error' }, 500)
    74→  }
    75→}
    76→
    77→interface StatsData {
    78→  totalInstances: number
    79→  activeInstances: {
    80→    today: number
    81→    last7Days: number
    82→    last30Days: number
    83→  }
    84→  todayStartups: number
    85→  onlineNow: number
    86→  versionDistribution: Array<{ version: string; count: number }>
    87→  nodeVersionDistribution: Array<{ node_version: string; count: number }>
    88→  dailyStartups: Array<{ date: string; count: number }>
    89→  dailyActiveInstances: Array<{ date: string; count: number }>
    90→}
    91→
    92→async function getStatsData(env: Env): Promise<StatsData> {
    93→  const [
    94→    totalInstances,
    95→    activeInstancesToday,
    96→    activeInstances7d,
    97→    activeInstances30d,
    98→    todayStartups,
    99→    onlineNow,
   100→    versionDistribution,
   101→    nodeVersionDistribution,
   102→    dailyStartups,
   103→    dailyActiveInstances,
   104→  ] = await Promise.all([
   105→    env.DB.prepare(
   106→      'SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT instance_id) as count FROM telemetry',
   107→    ).first<{ count: number }>(),
   108→
   109→    env.DB.prepare(
   110→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT instance_id) as count FROM telemetry
   111→       WHERE DATE(created_at) = DATE('now')`,
   112→    ).first<{ count: number }>(),
   113→
   114→    env.DB.prepare(
   115→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT instance_id) as count FROM telemetry
   116→       WHERE created_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days')`,
   117→    ).first<{ count: number }>(),
   118→
   119→    env.DB.prepare(
   120→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT instance_id) as count FROM telemetry
   121→       WHERE created_at >= datetime('now', '-30 days')`,
   122→    ).first<{ count: number }>(),
   123→
   124→    env.DB.prepare(
   125→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM telemetry
   126→       WHERE event = 'startup' AND DATE(created_at) = DATE('now')`,
   127→    ).first<{ count: number }>(),
   128→
   129→    env.DB.prepare(
   130→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT instance_id) as count FROM telemetry
   131→       WHERE created_at >= datetime('now', '-1 hour')`,
   132→    ).first<{ count: number }>(),
   133→
   134→    env.DB.prepare(
   135→      `SELECT version, COUNT(DISTINCT instance_id) as count
   136→       FROM telemetry
   137→       WHERE created_at >= datetime('now', '-30 days')
   138→       GROUP BY version
   139→       ORDER BY count DESC
   140→       LIMIT 20`,
   141→    ).all<{ version: string; count: number }>(),
   142→
   143→    env.DB.prepare(
   144→      `SELECT node_version, COUNT(DISTINCT instance_id) as count
   145→       FROM telemetry
   146→       WHERE node_version IS NOT NULL
   147→         AND created_at >= datetime('now', '-30 days')
   148→       GROUP BY node_version
   149→       ORDER BY count DESC
   150→       LIMIT 20`,
   151→    ).all<{ node_version: string; count: number }>(),
   152→
   153→    env.DB.prepare(
   154→      `SELECT DATE(created_at) as date, COUNT(*) as count
   155→       FROM telemetry
   156→       WHERE event = 'startup'
   157→         AND created_at >= datetime('now', '-30 days')
   158→       GROUP BY DATE(created_at)
   159→       ORDER BY date ASC`,
   160→    ).all<{ date: string; count: number }>(),
   161→
   162→    env.DB.prepare(
   163→      `SELECT DATE(created_at) as date, COUNT(DISTINCT instance_id) as count
   164→       FROM telemetry
   165→       WHERE created_at >= datetime('now', '-30 days')
   166→       GROUP BY DATE(created_at)
   167→       ORDER BY date ASC`,
   168→    ).all<{ date: string; count: number }>(),
   169→  ])
   170→
   171→  return {
   172→    totalInstances: totalInstances?.count || 0,
   173→    activeInstances: {
   174→      today: activeInstancesToday?.count || 0,
   175→      last7Days: activeInstances7d?.count || 0,
   176→      last30Days: activeInstances30d?.count || 0,
   177→    },
   178→    todayStartups: todayStartups?.count || 0,
   179→    onlineNow: onlineNow?.count || 0,
   180→    versionDistribution: versionDistribution.results,
   181→    nodeVersionDistribution: nodeVersionDistribution.results,
   182→    dailyStartups: dailyStartups.results,
   183→    dailyActiveInstances: dailyActiveInstances.results,
   184→  }
   185→}
   186→
   187→async function handleStats(env: Env): Promise<Response> {
   188→  try {
   189→    const stats = await getStatsData(env)
   190→    return jsonResponse(stats)
   191→  } catch (error) {
   192→    console.error('Stats error:', error)
   193→    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Internal server error' }, 500)
   194→  }
   195→}
   196→
   197→function generateDashboardHtml(stats: StatsData): string {
   198→  const versionLabels = safeJsonStringify(
   199→    stats.versionDistribution.map((v) => v.version),

   201→  const versionData = safeJsonStringify(

   204→  const nodeLabels = safeJsonStringify(

   210→  const dailyLabels = safeJsonStringify(stats.dailyStartups.map((d) => d.date))
   211→  const dailyStartupData = safeJsonStringify(

   214→  const dailyActiveData = safeJsonStringify(

   300→</head>
   301→<body>

   305→    <div class="stats-grid">

   457→}
   458→
   459→async function handleDashboard(env: Env): Promise<Response> {
   460→  try {
   461→    const stats = await getStatsData(env)
   462→    const html = generateDashboardHtml(stats)
   463→    return new Response(html, {
   464→      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8' },
   465→    })
   466→  } catch (error) {
   467→    console.error('Dashboard error:', error)
   468→    return new Response('Internal server error', { status: 500 })
   469→  }
   470→}
   471→
   472→async function handleCleanup(env: Env): Promise<void> {
   473→  await env.DB.prepare(
   474→    `DELETE FROM telemetry WHERE created_at < datetime('now', '-90 days')`,
   475→  ).run()
   476→}
   477→
   478→export default {
   479→  async fetch(
   480→    request: Request,
   481→    env: Env,
   482→    _ctx: ExecutionContext,
   483→  ): Promise<Response> {
   484→    const url = new URL(request.url)
   485→
   486→    if (request.method === 'OPTIONS') {
   487→      return new Response(null, { headers: corsHeaders })
   488→    }
   489→
   490→    if (url.pathname === '/collect' && request.method === 'POST') {
   491→      return handleCollect(request, env)
   492→    }
   493→
   494→    // Protected by Cloudflare Zero Trust
   495→    if (url.pathname === '/stats' && request.method === 'GET') {
   496→      return handleStats(env)
   497→    }
   498→
   499→    // Protected by Cloudflare Zero Trust
   500→    if (
   501→      (url.pathname === '/' || url.pathname === '/dashboard') &&
   502→      request.method === 'GET'
   503→    ) {
   504→      return handleDashboard(env)
   505→    }
   506→
   507→    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Not found' }, 404)
   508→  },
   509→
   510→  async scheduled(_event: ScheduledEvent, env: Env, ctx: ExecutionContext) {
   511→    ctx.waitUntil(handleCleanup(env))
   512→  },
   513→}
   514→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-16 11:05:39Z)**_

经吾详审全链路，问题根因如下:

`onlineCount` atom 初值为 0，唯经 WebSocket `VISITOR_ONLINE` 事件更新。服务端 `handleConnection` 调用 `whenUserOnline()`（debounce 1s，`leading: false`），后经 **Redis emitter** 广播。而 `super.handleConnect(socket)` 则直接 `client.send()` 送达 `GATEWAY_CONNECT`。

**核心问题**: `VISITOR_ONLINE` 经 Redis emitter 广播，`GATEWAY_CONNECT` 经 `client.send()` 直送。若 Redis emitter → adapter 链路有任何异常（配置、延迟、连接），`VISITOR_ONLINE` 事件永不达客户端，count 恒为 0。

**修复**：于 `handleConnection` 中，直接向新连接 socket 发送当前在线数（绕过 Redis emitter）。

`mx-core` 端修改 `apps/core/src/processors/gateway/web/events.gateway.ts`:

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-16 11:05:39Z)**_

```text
   186→      socket.handshake.query.socket_session_id ||
   187→      // fallback sid
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-16 11:05:51Z)**_

此修改于 `handleConnection` 末尾，直接向新连接 socket 发送 `VISITOR_ONLINE`，经 `socket.emit()` 而非 Redis emitter，确保消息必达。

`whenUserOnline()` 的广播仍保留，用以通知其他已连接客户端。新增的直送仅补充新连接者的初始计数。
